MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF PLTF'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.

DISCOVERY 301, AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT WESLEY CHENG'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT FIA CARD SERVICES TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCE FURTHER DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE COURT AWARDED $840.00 IN SANCTIONS. OPPOSITION WAS NOT TIMELY FILED. THE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf To Provide Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Documents Request, Produce Further Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MATTHEW BRENNER OF THE SOLOMON & BRENNER, TEL. NO. 595-8439 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT WESLEY CHENG'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff/Cross Defendant FIA Card Services To Provide Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Produce Further Documents And For Sanctions is Granted. The court awarded $840.00 in Sanctions. Opposition was not timely filed. The request for continuance is denied. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
